description: Instructional scenario text is progressively typed out on the screen, providing the participant with their task context.
frame_description: A dark background with white text being revealed word-by-word, describing a travel planning scenario.

description: A circular 'Open' button appears in the center of the screen to allow the user to proceed to the website.
frame_description: The instructional text is complete, and a blue 'Open' button has appeared below it.

description: User clicks the 'Open' button to initiate the task and open the browser.
frame_description: The cursor is centered over the 'Open' button at the moment of the click.

description: The browser opens a new tab and navigates to the Google homepage.
frame_description: A new browser window appears, loading the Google search page.

description: User hovers the cursor over the Google search input field, pausing before starting to type.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned inside the search bar on the Google homepage.

description: User types the search query 'webjet' into the Google search bar.
frame_description: The word 'webjet' is typed into the search bar.

description: Google search suggestions dropdown menu appears in response to the user's typing.
frame_description: A list of autocomplete suggestions appears beneath the search bar as the user types.

description: User selects the 'webjet' suggestion from the autocomplete list.
frame_description: The cursor moves down to the first suggestion in the dropdown and clicks it.

description: The browser navigates to the Google search results page for the query 'webjet'.
frame_description: The Google search results page loads, showing various links related to Webjet.

description: User clicks on the primary Webjet website link in the search results.
interaction_target: Webjet | Your go-to for going places. link
frame_description: The cursor is over the first search result link as the user clicks to navigate to the site.

description: The browser navigates to the Webjet homepage.
page_title: Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holiday Packages & Car Hire | Webjet
frame_description: The Webjet homepage is fully loaded, displaying the flight search widget and promotional banners.
